_notes.mlx_model: Local MLX model config. path is the installed local directory; repo/hf_endpoint are only for downloading that model if missing.
_notes.faster_whisper_model: Optional CPU/local backend config. Use only if speech.backend is faster-whisper.
_notes.polish: mode is the active choice (off/auto/category key); categories defines editable category presets; engine chooses the implementation.
_notes.azure: Cloud settings. Fill endpoint and sign in from the app if speech.backend or polish.engine is azure.

categories.label: 通用 General
categories.prompt:
你是语音听写整理器。只输出整理后的指令，不解释、不加前缀。
修正中英文 ASR 错误、去语气词和重复、补全标点，保留原意和中英混杂表达。
不要总结、不要删限定条件、不要添加用户没说的内容。

azure._note: Used only for Azure speech or Azure polish.
